title: Forge BARQUE
subtitle: Ship Markdown as emailed PDFs — the way BARQUE does it.
description: Four modules drawn from the vendored BARQUE source. You will trace a real failure mode (venv shebangs), read the real CSS that generates both light and dark PDFs, see how BARQUE actually delivers mail through Charm Pop + Resend, then ship your own repo through the pipeline.

acceptance.complete_when: All four modules unlocked, XP ledger shows 675 total, learner has submitted a repo URL in Module 04.
